title: The Radavist Podcast Episode 05: FAFO’ing with Spencer Harding
content:
In episode 05 of the podcast, Hailey chats with longtime contributor, weird bike aficionado, and photographer Spencer Harding. Tune in for a fun one about Spencer’s long relationship with bike touring, a sneak peek at some of the Dust-Ups that he is stewing on, and some unhinged stories!

Over the next few months, we’ll be mixing in more interviews with other regular contributors to The Radavist as a way for you all to get to know our writers outside of their articles and reviews. So to get things started we hope you enjoy this conversation with Spencer Harding, and be sure to peruse some of his past classics, linked below.

Listen to The Radavist Podcast on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, or Amazon Music. You can also use an RSS feed.

And please, if you like the content we produce over here, please sign up to support us via The Radavist Membership.

The post The Radavist Podcast Episode 05: FAFO’ing with Spencer Harding appeared first on The Radavist.
author: Hailey Moore
